CREATE TABLE polygons (id UInt32, shape Polygon) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE more_polygons AS SELECT id, shape FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
SELECT polygonPerimeterCartesian(shape) AS perimeter FROM more_polygons WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, polygonPerimeterCartesian([[[(0, 0), (3, 4), (5, 0), (0, 0)]]]) AS perimeter FROM polygons WHERE id = 2;
WITH (SELECT shape FROM polygons WHERE id = 1) AS shape1 SELECT polygonPerimeterCartesian(shape1) AS perimeter;
CREATE TABLE complex_shapes AS SELECT id, [[(0, 0), (2, 3), (3, 0), (0, 0)]] AS shape FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
